title: Equipment Dark
description: A resource pack that makes equipment and tools dark! Works great for combat!
body:
![The project's banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Xv0KV1HV/images/1626cdb82e713ab2e51d44f8b998489143e9c59f.png) # Equipment Dark A resource pack that makes equipment and tools dark! (Plus the in-game HUD) Continuity or OptiFine is heavily recommended, though not necessary. These mods allow for emissive textures in resource packs, which this one includes. Feel free to play vanilla if you want. View images here. (Or just press the gallery tab)
Tools/Weapons
Stone Stone Sword Stone Axe Stone Pickaxe Stone Shovel Stone Hoe
Wooden Wooden Sword Wooden Axe Wooden Pickaxe Wooden Shovel Wooden Hoe
Iron Iron Sword Iron Axe Iron Pickaxe Iron Shovel Iron Hoe
Golden Golden Sword Golden Axe Golden Pickaxe Golden Shovel Golden Hoe
Diamond Diamond Sword Diamond Axe Diamond Pickaxe Diamond Shovel Diamond Hoe
Netherite Netherite Sword Netherite Axe Netherite Pickaxe Netherite Shovel Netherite Hoe
Misc. Bow Crossbow Trident Shears
Miscellaneous
Arrow Spectral Arrow Stick Shield
Fishing Rod Carrot On A Stick Warped Fungus On A Stick Totem Of Undying
This resource pack does also change the block selection outline to turquoise, but if you want to choose a specific color, check out this other resource I've made.
